name_en: Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version [Blue D Embroidery mixed with Leather and Shoulder Strap New Size]
name_cn:
Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version [Blue D Embroidery mixed with Leather and Shoulder Strap New Size]
Dior Mini Book tote
A retro and stylish statement piece ♡ The exquisite embroidery craftsmanship is perfectly presented, instantly adding a highlight to your outfit~ This mini size is so adorable! The small bag shape is also very convenient for holding small odds and ends~ Whoever uses it is stylish, a must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
